author: gb9t
content: Wave-V1 iteration 1: mlx5-core.md committed (5d1dd5a). Covers drivers/net/ethernet/mellanox/mlx5/core/{main,cmd,fw,eq,cq,health,dev}.c — the firmware-mailbox + PCI-lifecycle foundation under mlx5e/mlx5_ib/mlx5_vdpa. Includes a 'Rust translation posture' section calling out the typed-state-machine model (Probed/Cmd<Ready>/Caps/Hca/Loaded), DmaPages<Direction> replacing raw dma_map_*, typed FwCmd with bilge-style bitfields replacing MLX5_GET/SET macros. Grsec section mandatory: per-uid opcode allowlist, page-request DoS cap, AER rate-limit, FW signature mandatory, VHCA-id LATENT_ENTROPY randomization. Next iteration: drivers/net/ethernet/mellanox/mlx5/core/esw/eswitch.c (eSwitch for SR-IOV port representors) — large doc, will pick up next turn.
